title: PCBWay sponsorship: full-size SD module for Arduino projects – colin@colino.net
description: My experience making assembled PCBs with PCBWay.

summaryHistory.summary: I also like, a lot, a few of PCBWay’s choices: upload a Kicad-made design, and they’ll give back 10% of the order to the Kicad project. I also like, a lot, a few of PCBWay’s choices: upload a Kicad-made design, and they’ll give back 10% of the order to the Kicad project.
